zh.Stanstead Mountfitchet, Essex, England: 英國艾可斯坦斯亞德 莫特費其特

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet於大約1190年出生在英國英格蘭素可斯坦斯亞德時，他的父親Richard De Montfichet41歲，母親Millicent de Montfichet35歲。他於大約1217年與Mrs Alice Montfichet在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1217年登記服兵役。他於1242年被列為sheriff of the county of essex。他去世於1267年1月12日在英國艾可斯坦斯亞德 莫特費其特享年78歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet于大约1190年出生在英国英格兰素可斯坦斯亞德时，他的父亲Richard De Montfichet41岁，母亲Millicent de Montfichet35岁。他于大约1217年与Mrs Alice Montfichet在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1217年登记服兵役。他于1242年被列为sheriff of the county of essex。他去世于1267年1月12日在英国艾可斯坦斯亞德 莫特費其特享年78岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet was born about 1190, in Stanstead, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard De Montfichet, was 41 and his mother, Millicent de Montfichet, was 35. He married Mrs Alice Montfichet about 1217, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He registered for military service in 1217. In 1242, his occupation is listed as sheriff of the county of essex. He died on 12 January 1267, in Stanstead Mountfitchet, Essex, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet est né environ 1190, à Stanstead, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard De Montfichet, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Millicent de Montfichet, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Alice Montfichet environ 1217, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1217. En 1242, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of the county of essex. Il est décédé le 12 janvier 1267, à Stanstead Mountfitchet, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet um 1190 in Stanstead, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard De Montfichet 41 und seine Mutter Millicent de Montfichet 35. Er hat um 1217 in England, United Kingdom Mrs Alice Montfichet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1217 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1242 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of the county of essex aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Januar 1267 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Stanstead Mountfitchet, Essex, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet è nato il circa 1190 nel Stanstead, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard De Montfichet, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Millicent de Montfichet, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Alice Montfichet circa 1217, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1217. Nel 1242, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of the county of essex. Morì il 12 gennaio 1267, nel Stanstead Mountfitchet, Essex, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchetが約1190年にイギリスイギリススセックススタンステアドで生まれた時，父Richard De Montfichetは41歳，母Millicent de Montfichetは35歳であった。約1217年にイギリスイギリスでMrs Alice Montfichetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1217年に兵役登録をした。1242年，職業はsheriff of the county of essexと記録されている。彼は1267年1月12日にイギリスエセックススタンステアド モウントフィトチェトで78歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 스탠스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard De Montfichet(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Millicent de Montfichet(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1217년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Mrs Alice Montfichet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1217년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1242년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of the county of essex이었다. 그는 1267년 1월 12일 영국 에세스 스탠스테아드 모우트핏쳇에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Stanstead, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard De Montfichet, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Millicent de Montfichet, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Alice Montfichet aproximadamente 1217, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1217. Em 1242, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of the county of essex. Ele faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1267, em Stanstead Mountfitchet, Essex, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet родился около 1190 г. в местности станстид, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard De Montfichet было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Millicent de Montfichet, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Alice Montfichet около 1217 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1217 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1242 годуработал по профессии sheriff of the county of essex. Он умер 12 января 1267 г. в местности станстид маунтфичет, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

sm.from 1242 to 1246: mai le 1242 e o'o I le 1246

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Montfitchet 5th Baron de Montfitchet nació aproximadamente 1190, en Stanstead, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard De Montfichet, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Millicent de Montfichet, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Mrs Alice Montfichet aproximadamente 1217, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1217. En 1242, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of the county of essex. Murió el 12 de enero de 1267, en Stanstead Mountfitchet, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
